description: The La Sirena crew reach Freecloud and find Bruce Maddox in a precarious situation, so Seven of Nine, the ex-Borg they recently picked up, lends her assistance.

title: The Impossible Box
description: Picard and the crew trace Soji to the Borg cube, forcing Picard to face memories of being Locutus; Narek believes he's found a way to safely exploit information from Soji.

title: Nepenthe
description: Picard and Soji, who's struggling to make sense of her recently unlocked memories, travel to a planet that happens to be the home of Picard's old friends Will Riker and Deanna Troi; Elnor and Hugh are left on the Borg cube to face Narissa.

title: Broken Pieces
description: Picard realizes how far some will go to protect secrets that go back generations when truths about the attack on Mars are revealed; Narissa orders her guards to capture Elnor, setting off a chain reaction on the Borg cube.

title: Et in Arcadia Ego, Part 1
description: With the Romulans in pursuit, Picard and the crew finally reach Soji's home planet - and discover more than they expected about the inhabitants.

title: Et in Arcadia Ego, Part 2
description: Picard and his team are pitted against the Romulans and the synthetics of Coppelius in a final confrontation.

title: The Star Gazer
description: Starfleet must once again call on legendary Jean-Luc Picard after members of his former crew - Cristóbal Rios, Seven of Nine, Raffi Musiker, and Dr. Agnes Jurati - discover an anomaly in space that threatens the galaxy.

title: Penance
description: Picard finds himself transported to an alternate timeline in the year 2400 where he must face one last trial orchestrated by his longtime nemesis Q.

title: Assimilation
description: Picard and the crew travel back to 2024 Los Angeles in search of the one person who can help them identify the point at which time diverged.

title: Watcher
description: With time running out to save the future, Picard seeks out an old friend for help; Rios winds up on the wrong side of the law; Jurati makes a deal with the Borg Queen.

title: Fly Me to the Moon
description: Picard discovers an important person from his past, Q continues his manipulation of the timeline, taking an interest in Dr. Adam Soong. Seven and Raffi attempt a daring rescue of Rios.

title: Two of One
description: Tallinn helps Picard and the crew infiltrate a gala on the eve of a joint space mission to protect an astronaut they believe is integral in restoring the timeline - Renee Picard; Kore makes a startling discovery about her father's work.

title: Monsters
description: Tallinn enters Picard's subconscious mind to help him wake from a coma and face his deepest fears; Seven and Raffi search for Jurati fearing she's succumbed to her inner monster; Rios struggles to hide the truth about himself from Teresa.

title: Mercy
description: With time running out before the launch of the Europa Mission, Picard and Guinan must free themselves from FBI custody. Seven and Raffi come face-to-face with Jurati and the horror of what she's become.

title: Hide and Seek
description: Picard must face the ghosts of his past when he and his crew are attacked by a new incarnation of an old enemy; Seven and Raffi face Jurati in a final showdown.

title: Farewell
description: With just hours until the Europa Launch, Picard and the crew find themselves in a race against time to save the future.

title: The Next Generation
description: After receiving a distress call from Beverly Crusher, Jean-Luc Picard enlists help from generations old and new for one last adventure: a mission that will change Starfleet and his old crew forever.

title: Disengage
description: Aided by crew of the U.S.S. Titan, Picard makes a discovery that will alter his life forever and puts him on a collision course with the most cunning enemy he's ever encountered.

title: Seventeen Seconds
description: Picard grapples with a life-altering revelation as the crew of the Titan attempt to outmaneuver Vadic, while Raffi and Worf uncover a plot by a vengeful enemy.

title: No Win Scenario
description: Picard, Riker and crew must confront the sins of their past as the Titan drifts helplessly in a mysterious space anomaly.

title: Imposters
description: Caught by Starfleet and facing court martial, paranoia grows as Picard struggles to uncover whether a prodigal crewman from his past has returned as an ally - or an enemy hellbent on destroying them all.

title: The Bounty
description: Now on the run, Picard and the skeleton crew of the USS Titan must break into Starfleet's most top secret facility to expose a plot that could destroy the Federation. Picard must turn to an old friend for help.

title: Dominion
description: Crippled, cornered, and out of options, Picard stages a gambit to trap Vadic and reveal her true motive - a gamble that puts the Titan in the crosshairs and forces Picard and Beverly to question every moral code they've ever held.

title: Surrender
description: Vadic forces Picard to make an impossible choice: deliver what he can never give - or watch his crew perish. Their only salvation lies in the mind of an old friend and old foe.

title: Võx
description: A devastating revelation about Jack alters the course of Picard's life - and uncovers a truth that threatens every soul in the Federation. Picard and his crew race to save the galaxy from annihilation - at a gut-wrenching cost.

title: The Last Generation
description: In a desperate last stand, Jean-Luc Picard and generations of crews both old and new fight together to save the galaxy from the greatest threat they've ever faced.

title: Second Contact
description: Ensigns Mariner and Boimler run into difficulty on Galar. Meanwhile, an alien virus infects the crew of the Cerritos.

title: Envoys
description: After a high-profile mission goes awry, Boimler is further plagued with self-doubt when Mariner proves herself to be a more naturally talented sci-fi badass than he. Rutherford quits his job in engineering and explores other departments on the U.S.S. Cerritos.

title: Temporal Edict
description: A new work protocol eliminating "buffer time" has the Lower Decks crew running ragged as they try to keep up with their tightened schedules. Ensign Mariner and Commander Ransom's mutual lack of respect comes to a head during an away mission.

title: Moist Vessel
description: Captain Freeman seeks the ultimate payback after Mariner blatantly disrespects her in front of the crew. A well-meaning Tendi accidentally messes up a lieutenant's attempt at spiritual ascension and tries to make it right.

title: Cupid's Errant Arrow
description: Mariner is suspicious of Boimler's new girlfriend. Tendi and Rutherford grow jealous of a bigger starship's gear.

title: Terminal Provocations
description: The lovable but awkward Ensign Fletcher makes work difficult for Mariner and Boimler. Rutherford introduces Tendi to a holodeck training program that he created.

title: Much Ado About Boimler
description: Mariner tries to impress her best friend from Starfleet Academy who is now a visiting captain. Boimler is sent to a Starfleet medical ship after a transporter accident puts him "out of phase."

title: Veritas
description: Mariner, Boimler, Tendi, and Rutherford are caught off guard when aliens force them to testify about a series of seemingly unrelated events.

title: Crisis Point
description: Mariner repurposes Boimler's holodeck program to cast herself as the villain in a Lower Decks style movie.

title: No Small Parts
description: The USS Cerritos encounters a familiar enemy. Tendi helps a struggling recruit find her footing.

title: Strange Energies
description: The U.S.S. Cerritos is dispatched on a mission which results in an encounter with "strange energy."

title: Kayshon, His Eyes Open
description: Our Lower Deckers have trouble bonding with Ensign Jet Manhaver, who has been assigned Boimler's bunk and shift duties. Meanwhile, we get a glimpse of Boimler's life on the U.S.S. Titan, which is more intense than he thought it would be.

title: We'll Always Have Tom Paris
description: Assigned a special task by Dr. T'Ana, Tendi enlists Mariner for help. On the U.S.S. Cerritos, Rutherford is consumed by a bridge crew mystery.

title: Mugato, Gumato
description: The USS Cerritos is dispatched to a planet to investigate an unexplained sighting of a dangerous Mugato.

title: An Embarrassment of Dooplers
description: Mariner and Boimler try to track down the location of a legendary Starfleet party while the bridge crew deals with an insecure alien diplomat.

title: The Spy Humongous
description: Anomaly consolidation day on the U.S.S. Cerritos leaves the Lower Deckers with mixed emotions. Captain Freeman attempts to negotiate peace on the Pakled home world.

title: Where Pleasant Fountains Lie
description: Mariner & Boimler are stranded on an uninhabited planet with a sentient computer. On the Cerritos, Lt. Commander Billups must prove his engineering abilities to an old adversary.

title: I, Excretus
description: A consultant arrives on the U.S.S. Cerritos to run drills that require the lower deckers and bridge crew to swap duties.

title: wej Duj
description: As the U.S.S. Cerritos crew has downtime during a long warp trip, a Klingon ship and a Vulcan one find themselves unknowingly heading to an encounter with the Starfleet ship.

title: First First Contact
description: The U.S.S. Cerritos is tasked to aid an Excelsior-class starship on a first contact mission.

title: Grounded
description: Mariner enlists her friends on a rogue mission to exonerate her mother as Captain Freeman faces a military tribunal for the destruction of Pakled Planet.

title: The Least Dangerous Game
description: On a tropical paradise planet, Mariner questions Commander Ransom on how he structures his away team. Boimler makes a bold career decision.

title: Mining the Mind's Mines
description: On a remote science outpost, stone orbs are bringing fantasies to life. Tendi starts her first day as a Senior Science Officer Trainee.

title: Room for Growth
description: Mariner, Boimler, and Tendi clash with their arch-rivals: Delta Shift. The Cerritos engineers go on mandatory relaxation leave.

title: Reflections
description: Mariner and Boimler work the Starfleet recruitment booth at an alien job fair, Rutherford challenges himself.

title: Hear All, Trust Nothing
description: The Cerritos crew unexpectedly spends a day on Deep Space 9.

title: A Mathematically Perfect Redemption
description: A wayward Starfleet ensign struggles to find a path to redemption.

title: Crisis Point 2: Paradoxus
description: Boimler's holodeck movie sequel tries to live up to the original.

title: Trusted Sources
description: A visiting reporter on the Cerritos puts Captain Freeman on edge.

title: The Stars at Night
description: The Cerritos crew must prove their worth in a mission race.

title: Twovix
description: The Cerritos ensigns must assist a caretaker on the voyage of a historically significant starship.

title: I Have No Bones Yet I Must Flee
description: Mariner tries to get demoted, Rutherford tries to get promoted, Boimler makes a big move.

title: In the Cradle of Vexilon
description: Boimler leads his first away mission on an alien megastructure.

title: Something Borrowed, Something Green
description: Tendi is summoned back to Orion for a wedding.

title: Empathological Fallacies
description: The hedonistic behavior of a Betazoid delegation is suspected of affecting the crew.

title: Parth Ferengi's Heart Place
description: The Cerritos visits the Ferengi homeworld.

title: A Few Badgeys More
description: Three computerized villains return to cause problems for the Cerritos crew.

title: Caves
description: The Lower Deckers go on a classic cave mission.

title: The Inner Fight
description: Captain Freeman assigns the Lower Deckers an overly safe mission to try and keep a self-destructive Mariner out of danger.

title: Old Friends, New Planets
description: Mariner finds herself held as the hoped-for ally of the disgraced Nick Locarno, now a megalomaniacal insurrectionist armed with a rebel fleet and a destructively planet-reforming Genesis device.

title: Dos Cerritos
description: A spatial anomaly forces the Cerritos crew to face their own faces.

title: Shades of Green
description: Tendi races to stop a conflict, while Boimler and Mariner race to stop capitalists.

title: The Best Exotic Nanite Hotel
description: The Lower Deckers hunt nanites on a resort in space.

title: A Farewell To Farms
description: Dr. Migleemo cooks up some hot dishes. Mariner prefers hers served cold.

title: Starbase 80?!
description: Ransom uses too much disinfectant gel while Mariner gets paranoid about curses.

title: Of Gods and Angles
description: The Cerritos hosts peace talks between warring civilizations.

title: Fully Dilated
description: It's a pre-warp society undercover Girls Trip.

title: Upper Decks
description: The Lower Deckers have a pumpkin carving party.

title: Fissure Quest
description: Fissures must be closed before they get inflamed.

title: The New Next Generation
description: Season finale where lots of wild stuff happens.

title: Lost and Found, Part 1
description: The young alien Dal finds a hidden starfleet spaceship during an escape attempt from a mine planet. But who is still after the ship?

title: Lost and Found, Part 2
description: Dal needs a strong crew for the new ship if they want to leave Tars Lamora. But the Diviner and his daughter Gwyn have other plans.

title: Starstruck
description: Even with the guidance of their hologram advisor Janeway, the crew of The Protostar is tested when their ship is on a dangerous cosmic collision course.

title: Dream Catcher
description: The crew has their first away mission on an undiscovered planet that manifests their deepest desires, only to realize the planet has desires of its own.

title: Terror Firma
description: Marooned on a deadly planet, the crew must work together with their captive Gwyn to stay alive...except the planet isn't the only thing in pursuit.

title: Kobayashi
description: As Gwyn struggles to find her role aboard the USS Protostar, Dal tests his leadership skills in the newly discovered holodeck.

title: First Con-tact
description: When a mentor from Dal's past persuades him to use their Federation cover for personal gain, they quickly discover Starfleet has protocols for a reason.

title: Time Amok
description: When an anomaly fractures the U.S.S. Protostar in time, Hologram Janeway must synchronize the disjointed crew and save their ship before it destructs.

title: A Moral Star, Part 1
description: The crew forgo their dreams of Starfleet to return to Tars Lamora in a no-win scenario.

title: A Moral Star, Part 2
description: When their plan goes awry, the crew must improvise. Meanwhile, Gwyn discovers a dark truth that will forever jeopardize their quest toward salvation.

title: Asylum
description: At the edge of Federation space, the crew applies for asylum at a comm relay outpost, only for their starship to reveal its shocking true purpose.

title: Let Sleeping Borg Lie
description: When the crew encounters a dormant Borg Cube, Zero risks everything to save their ship.

title: All the World's a Stage
description: The crew answers a distress call to find a colony trapped in Starfleet's past.

title: Crossroads
description: When the crew attempts to secure transport to the Federation, they unwittingly cross paths with the Vice Admiral who is hunting them.

title: Masquerade
description: Trapped in the Neutral Zone, the crew encounters a rogue geneticist who sheds light on Dal's past.

title: Preludes
description: A Starfleet admiral digs into the past of the Protostar crew. Meanwhile, the Diviner recalls his life's mission.

title: Ghost in the Machine
description: When the crew gets trapped in the holodeck by a mysterious malfunction, they aren't sure what's programmed or what's real.

title: Mindwalk
description: Desperate to warn Starfleet of their dilemma, a daring experiment goes awry as Dal inadvertently swaps mind with a Starfleet Vice Admiral.

title: Supernova, Part 1
description: Surrounded by the Federation armada, the crew attempts to stop their ship from destroying all of Starfleet.

title: Supernova, Part 2
description: As the Federation hangs in the balance, the crew must make the ultimate sacrifice to save Starfleet's future.

title: Into the Breach, Part 1
description: Dal and his friends board Janeway's starship to investigate the wormhole created by the Protostar. Tired of his training, Dal longs for some action.

title: Into the Breach, Part 2
description: Gwyn runs into a familiar foe on the planet Solum. Janeway reveals the true stakes of their mission to Dal and his friends.

title: Who Saves the Saviors
description: Traveling through the time rift, Dal and the crew search for Chakotay on Solum. With the support of her father, Gwyn challenges Ascencia.

title: Temporal Mechanics 101
description: Although separated by decades, the Infinity and the Voyager crews band together to save Gwyn's life. A mysterious messenger reaches out to Gwyn.

title: Observer's Paradox
description: Reunited on Voyager and under strict supervision, the gang must decode a secret message their mysterious benefactor left with Murf.

title: Imposter Syndrome
description: Hoping to hijack the Infinity before its scheduled destruction, Dal and the crew create hologram doubles to cover for their absence.

title: The Fast and the Curious
description: After using a Borg conduit to travel through time faster, Dal and his friends find themselves at the mercy of a demanding Kazon.

title: Is There in Beauty No Truth?
description: The crew detours to a colony of non-corporeal entities, who offer Zero an opportunity to obtain a physical body. Janeway discovers Dal's real intentions.

title: The Devourer of All Things, Part 1
description: Finally arriving at the coordinates, the Infinity crew discovers a hidden planet - and the long-awaited identity of their mysterious messenger.

title: The Devourer of All Things, Part 2
description: On the run from their time-erasing pursuers, the Infinity crew and their new ally search for an escape. Voyager embarks on a rescue mission.

title: Last Flight of the Protostar, Part 1
description: Thanks to Wesley Crusher's timely intervention, the cadets find the Protostar - but the ship's marooned guardian isn't eager for their assistance.

title: Last Flight of the Protostar, Part 2
description: Chakotay and the cadets devise a bold but perilous plan to relaunch the Protostar. Before the ship can fly, however, it will first have to sail.

title: A Tribble Called Quest
description: While harvesting bosonite on a barren world, the crew encounters aggressive, genetically-modified tribbles - and the Klingon scientist who created them.

title: Cracked Mirror
description: The Protostar's reunion with Voyager has unexpected side effects, bouncing the crew between alternate realities - including the Mirror Universe.

title: Ascension, Part 1
description: Just as the Protostar and Voyager crews bring their mission to a close, a former enemy suddenly resurfaces with surprising new powers.

title: Ascension, Part 2
description: Overwhelmed by Asencia's mysteriously advanced weaponry, the Protostar and Voyager crews take a series of calculated risks that endanger the cadets.

title: Brink
description: As war looms between the Federation and Solum, Gwyn proposes to lead the cadets on an undercover mission to gather intelligence and rescue Ilthuran.

title: Touch of Grey
description: Admiral Janeway devises a clever plan to liberate her crew from Asencia's prison, where they're trapped with an angry captive from the Loom.

title: Ouroboros, Part 1
description: A desperate Asencia launches an all-out attack on the Federation that will destroy subspace, while Wesley and the cadets try to correct the timeline.

title: Ouroboros, Part 2
description: The cadets fight Asencia in a battle for control of Solum and the future - but a sudden invasion by a destructive species complicates their end-game.

title: Strange New Worlds
description: Captain Christopher Pike comes out of self-imposed exile to rescue an officer gone missing during a secret mission.

title: Children of the Comet
description: An ancient alien relic thwarts the Enterprise crew from re-routing a comet on track to strike an inhabited planet.

title: Ghosts of Illyria
description: Una must confront a secret she's been hiding when a contagion ravages the ship, incapacitating the rest of the crew.

title: Memento Mori
description: Pike must find unconventional Starfleet methods to deal with a malevolent force that attacks the Enterprise.

title: Spock Amok
description: A personal visit causes a comedy of errors during Spock & Pike's crucial negotiations with an unusual alien species.

title: Lift Us Where Suffering Cannot Reach
description: A threat to an idyllic planet reunites Captain Pike with the lost love of his life. To protect her and a scientific holy child from a conspiracy, Pike offers his help and is forced to face unresolved feelings of his past.

title: The Serene Squall
description: While on a dangerous humanitarian mission, the crew of the Enterprise stumbles into a harrowing game of leverage with the quadrant's deadliest space pirate.

title: The Elysian Kingdom
description: The USS Enterprise becomes stuck in a nebula that's home to an alien consciousness which traps the crew in a fairy tale.

title: All Those Who Wander
description: Enterprise crew comes face-to-face with their demons - and scary monsters too - when their landing party's stranded on a barren planet with a ravenous enemy.

title: A Quality of Mercy
description: In the season one finale, just as Captain Pike thinks he's figured out how to escape his fate, he's visited by his future self, who shows him the consequences of his actions.

title: The Broken Circle
description: A distress call from Lt. Noonien-Singh compels Spock to disobey orders and take the Enterprise and its crew into disputed space on a rescue mission.

title: Ad Astra per Aspera
description: Commander Una Chin-Riley faces court martial, imprisonment and dishonorable discharge from Starfleet.

title: Tomorrow and Tomorrow and Tomorrow
description: La'an travels back in time to 21st-century Earth to prevent an attack which will alter humanity's future history.

title: Among the Lotus Eaters
description: Returning to a planet that dredges up tragic memories, Captain Pike and his landing party find themselves forgetting everything, including their own identities as he confronts a ghost from his past.

title: Charades
description: A shuttle accident leads to Spock's Vulcan DNA being removed by aliens, making him fully human and completely unprepared to face T'Pring's family during an important ceremonial dinner.

title: Lost in Translation
description: Uhura seems to be the only one who can hear a strange sound that seems to trigger terrifying hallucinations.

title: Those Old Scientists
description: An accident while investigating a time portal sends Ensigns Beckett Mariner and Bradward Boimler through time from the 24th Century, and Captain Pike and his crew must get them back where they belong before they can alter the timeline.

title: Under the Cloak of War
description: Captain Pike and his crew welcome a Klingon defector aboard the U.S.S. Enterprise, but his presence triggers the revelation of some shocking secrets.

title: Subspace Rhapsody
description: An accident with an experimental quantum probability field causes everyone on the Enterprise to break uncontrollably into song, but the real danger is that the field is expanding & beginning to impact other ships - allies & enemies alike.

title: Hegemony
description: When the Enterprise investigates an attack on a colony at the edge of Federation space, Captain Pike and the crew face the return of a formidable enemy.

title: Hegemony, Part II
description: Pike risks it all, taking the Enterprise on a daring rescue mission behind enemy lines, while the landing party attempts an escape from a deadly enemy.

title: Wedding Bell Blues
description: At a Federation celebration, an uninvited guest disrupts Spock and the crew's reflections.

title: Shuttle to Kenfori
description: In order to cure Batel, Pike and M'Benga travel to Klingon space, where M'Benga's past resurfaces on a dangerous planet.

title: A Space Adventure Hour
description: When La'An tests a prototype holodeck with a fictional case only she can solve, the consequences of failure get greater and greater, with the Enterprise hanging in the balance.

title: Through the Lens of Time
description: Chapel and Korby's quest leads the Enterprise to ancient ruins hiding a dark secret.

title: The Sehlat Who Ate Its Tail
description: Kirk's first day as captain turns disastrous when a scavenger ship seizes the Enterprise.

title: What Is Starfleet?
description: While aiding a war-torn planet, Pike and crew face scrutiny from a probing journalist.

title: Four-and-a-Half Vulcans
description: After a mission turns crew members into Vulcans, trouble arises when they try to revert to human.

title: Terrarium
description: Stranded on a toxic moon, Ortegas must defy her deepest beliefs to survive.

title: New Life and New Civilizations
description: When an ancient evil resurfaces, Pike faces a life-altering choice to stop it.

title: Kids These Days
description: After fleeing since childhood, 21-year-old genius Caleb must decide whether to accept a spot at the new Starfleet Academy from Chancellor Nahla Ake - the captain who imprisoned his mother 15 years ago.

title: Beta Test
description: While struggling with doubts about his Starfleet Academy future, Caleb guides a former ally's daughter around campus, leading him to discover the true meaning of Academy life.

title: Vitus Reflux
description: While our cadets compete to join an elite team at the Academy, a battle of escalating pranks breaks out between Starfleet Academy and the rival War College. Tensions rise, threatening their newly emerging bonds and a blossoming romance.

title: Vox in Excelso
description: Jay-Den faces an existential crisis that threatens his species while confronting his past.

title: Series Acclimation Mil
description: Sam sets out to solve an ancient Starfleet mystery and embarks on a journey of self-discovery.

title: Come, Let's Away
description: Cadets face a deadly new threat during their first training mission aboard a derelict vessel, forcing them to fight for their lives as Nahla turns to an unlikely ally for assistance.

title: Ko'Zeine
description: During a school holiday, cadets return home and must choose between family expectations and dreams.

title: The Life of the Stars
description: A visiting instructor forces the cadets to face the emotional realities of serving in Starfleet.

title: 300th Night
description: As the year ends, Caleb must choose between the life he wanted and the life he's built at Starfleet Academy. Nahla breaks protocol to keep her promise.

title: Rubincon
description: An old enemy's return forces Nahla to confront her mistakes in a mission to save the Federation.
